title: Sunset [16x]
body:
Sunset is a summer themed orange & purple resource pack.

It was mainly made cause my creativity wanted to cook something for the summer so here it is !

It is mainly made for 1.8.9 bedwars but can also be used in random pvp gamemodes.

Here are some ingame screenshots :)

![Sunset prev1](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ea07cc8cbf83cdcb80155d9e069ddfa9434c0f51.jpeg)

![Sunset prev2](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/0e9114ef3e1fd4509f59b4741845a0c9263c5607.jpeg)

Sidenote : Feel free to join the discord if there is any issues with the Texture pack (Rendering Issues, Crashes, Textures not working properly, Sky glitches and/or not rendering...) It helps us greatly improve the work we do and provide the best for you all !
